glosses.ja: 計画する; 上映する

sentences.target: Je projette un voyage en avril.

translations.fr: Je projette un voyage en avril.
translations.en: I'm planning a trip in April.
translations.es: Estoy planeando un viaje en abril.
translations.de: Ich plane im April eine Reise.
translations.it: Sto pianificando un viaggio ad aprile.
translations.pt: Estou planejando uma viagem em abril.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lên kế hoạch cho một chuyến đi vào tháng Tư.
translations.nl: Ik plan een reis in april.
translations.hi: मैं अप्रैल में यात्रा की योजना बना रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg planlegger en reise i april.
translations.id: Saya sedang merencanakan perjalanan pada bulan April.
translations.sv: Jag planerar en resa i april.
translations.da: Jeg planlægger en rejse i april.
translations.ja: 4月に旅行を計画しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; here with the sense “to plan.”
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Month name used as a common noun; object of the preposition en.

sentences.target: On projette un film dans le jardin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁɔʒɛt œ̃ film dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/

translations.fr: On projette un film dans le jardin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁɔʒɛt œ̃ film dɑ̃ lə ʒaʁdɛ̃/
translations.en: We're screening a movie in the yard.
translations.es: Estamos proyectando una película en el jardín.
translations.de: Wir zeigen einen Film im Garten.
translations.it: Stiamo proiettando un film in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在院子里放映一部电影。
translations.pt: Estamos exibindo um filme no quintal.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chiếu phim ở sân.
translations.nl: We draaien een film in de tuin.
translations.hi: हम आंगन में एक फिल्म दिखा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi viser en film i hagen.
translations.sv: Vi visar en film i trädgården.
translations.da: Vi viser en film i haven.
translations.ja: 庭で映画を上映しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal or colloquial ‘we’; 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; sense “to project/screen.”
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition of location.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition dans.

sentences.target: Je voudrais projeter des photos demain.

translations.fr: Je voudrais projeter des photos demain.
translations.en: I’d like to project some photos tomorrow.
translations.es: Me gustaría proyectar unas fotos mañana.
translations.de: Ich möchte morgen einige Fotos projizieren.
translations.ko: 내일 사진 몇 장을 프로젝터로 보여주고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想明天投影一些照片。
translations.ru: Я хотел бы завтра показать несколько фотографий на проекторе.
translations.pt: Eu gostaria de projetar algumas fotos amanhã.
translations.he: אני רוצה להקרין כמה תמונות מחר.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn trình chiếu một vài bức ảnh vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik wil morgen enkele foto's projecteren.
translations.uk: Я хотів би завтра показати кілька фотографій на проєкторі.
translations.hi: मैं कल कुछ तस्वीरें प्रोजेक्टर पर दिखाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να προβάλω μερικές φωτογραφίες αύριο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne projisere noen bilder i morgen.
translations.id: Saya ingin memproyeksikan beberapa foto besok.
translations.sv: Jag skulle vilja projicera några bilder i morgon.
translations.ro: Aș vrea să proiectez câteva fotografii mâine.
translations.cs: Chtěl bych zítra promítnout několik fotografií.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne projicere nogle billeder i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日いくつかの写真をプロジェクターで映したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Lexical verb (modal-like), conditional present, 1st person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb complement of voudrais.
Indefinite plural article introducing a plural noun.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of projeter.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action will occur.

sentences.target: Nous projetons la présentation à onze heures.
sentences.reading: /nu pʁɔʒətɔ̃ la pʁezɑ̃tasjɔ̃ a ɔ̃z œʁ/

translations.fr: Nous projetons la présentation à onze heures.
translations.ipa: /nu pʁɔʒətɔ̃ la pʁezɑ̃tasjɔ̃ a ɔ̃z œʁ/
translations.en: We’re showing the presentation at eleven o’clock.
translations.es: Proyectamos la presentación a las once.
translations.de: Wir zeigen die Präsentation um elf Uhr.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在十一点展示演示文稿。
translations.yue: 我哋喺十一點投影簡報。
translations.ru: Мы показываем презентацию в одиннадцать часов.
translations.pt: Exibimos a apresentação às onze horas.
translations.he: אנחנו מציגים את המצגת בשעה אחת עשרה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trình chiếu bài thuyết trình lúc mười một giờ.
translations.ar: نعرض العرض التقديمي في الساعة الحادية عشرة.
translations.nl: We tonen de presentatie om elf uur.
translations.hi: हम प्रस्तुति को ग्यारह बजे दिखा रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami menayangkan presentasi pada pukul sebelas.
translations.ja: プレゼンテーションを11時に投影します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition marking time.
Cardinal numeral; part of the time expression.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of à specifying the time.
